lifecycle_t(3) Library Functions Manual lifecycle_t(3)

NAME

lifecycle_t

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/util/lifecycle.h>

Data Fields


atomic_t state
lifecycle_state_t enum value lifecycle_sync_type_t sync_type
Type of sync primitive (if any). union {
mutex_t * mutex
Pointer to mutex (if sync_type == LIFECYCLE_SYNC_MUTEX). rwlock_t * rwlock
Pointer to rwlock (if sync_type == LIFECYCLE_SYNC_RWLOCK). } sync

Detailed Description

Lock-free module lifecycle state machine with optional sync primitive. Combines init/shutdown state with mutex or rwlock initialization.

Definition at line 58 of file lifecycle.h.

Field Documentation

mutex_t* lifecycle_t::mutex

Pointer to mutex (if sync_type == LIFECYCLE_SYNC_MUTEX).

rwlock_t* lifecycle_t::rwlock

Pointer to rwlock (if sync_type == LIFECYCLE_SYNC_RWLOCK).
